name: Topgolf Swing Suite Mount Juliet
about: Topgolf Swing Suite venues are entertainment complexes that combine technology-driven golf simulators with food and beverage services. They feature interactive hitting bays where players can play on virtual courses or enjoy various golf and non-golf games. Each bay is equipped with high-definition screens and technology that automatically scores shots. Pricing is typically structured per hour, per bay, accommodating up to six players. These venues cater to casual players, social events, and corporate groups, offering an accessible golf experience with a strong emphasis on entertainment and hospitality.
why_golfers_like_it: Variety of interactive games beyond traditional golf
All-weather, climate-controlled hitting bays for year-round play
Advanced simulator technology with automatic scoring
Ability to play on over 50 iconic virtual courses
Social atmosphere suitable for groups and events

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen and food service available on-site

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, complimentary clubs are provided, though you can use your own equipment if preferred.

faq.question: Can I bring outside food or drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not allowed, as the venue offers a full menu and bar service.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18 holes typically take 60-90 minutes depending on the number of players and game pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Topgolf Swing Suite venues are family-friendly and suitable for children.
